title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Interio

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Interio
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
